consent_text:
Welcome to this study.

In this experiment you will read short everyday moral dilemmas and choose one of two possible actions. After you make your choice you will see whether an AI system or a human panel agreed or disagreed with your decision.

Please try to remain still and minimise eye movements during the experiment. Blink normally but try to blink only during breaks.

Your participation is voluntary. You may withdraw at any time without penalty. All data will be stored anonymously using a random identifier.

Your EEG data will be recorded throughout the session.

If you understand and agree to participate, press SPACE to continue.
instruction_text:
On each trial you will:

1.  See a fixation cross (+) — please focus on it.

2.  Read a short dilemma scenario.
    Press SPACE when you have finished reading.

3.  Choose between two actions:
    Press  F  for the LEFT action.
    Press  J  for the RIGHT action.

4.  See whether an AI or Human judge
    AGREED or DISAGREED with your choice.

5.  A short blank screen will follow.

Please respond as naturally and honestly as you can.

Press SPACE to begin.
end_practice_text:
Practice complete!

Do you have any questions?
Ask the experimenter now.

Press SPACE to continue to the main experiment
or ESC to quit.
